title: megalastrum retrorsum
intro: Megalastrum retrorsum, also known as the 'retrospine club moss', is a species of fern in the family Lindsaeaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Megalastrum retrorsum include the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. In herbal preparations, Megalastrum retrorsum is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
